subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hello Bob,

Thanks for following up. We’d be happy to arrange a meeting to discuss potential collaboration.

The following meeting windows are available:
- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00

If one of those works for you, please let us know your preferred time within the window and we can coordinate accordingly.

I’m not able to share internal contact details or directory information for internal team members, but I can help route coordination through the proper channel.

Best regards,
